meaning: n.娣变俊,纭俊,瀹氱姜,瀹ｅ憡鏈夌姜
examples: It is our firm conviction that a step forward has been taken.
He will appeal against his conviction.
His lawyers sought to have the conviction dismissed and appealed the ban from the industry.
The judge noted that Carlton had a "significant" criminal record before his latest conviction.
